Dunkin' Credit.note: $7/mo statement credit at U.S. Dunkin' locations (enrollment required)

Dining Credit.note: $10/mo Uber Eats/Grubhub etc.; delivery-first so not a walk-in geofence target — kept for reference, excluded from location matching by kind:online

Resy Credit.note: $10/mo at Resy-booked U.S. restaurants; Resy is a reservation network, not a storefront, so no brand geo query can identify redeemable locations — excluded from location matching by kind:online until a per-restaurant approach exists

Saks Credit.note: $50 semiannual statement credit at Saks Fifth Avenue (in-store or online)

Uber Cash.note: $15/mo (+$20 Dec) Uber Cash; rides/eats, no storefront — excluded from location matching by kind:online
